info.title: Ootils Core API
info.description: Ootils Core REST API — supply chain planning engine.

post.description: Submit a planning event that triggers recalculation.

get.description: Return the event log, ordered by created_at DESC.
Return projected inventory buckets for an item/location pair, with supply/demand breakdown.

parameters.name: grain

schema.description: day / week / month — aggregates daily buckets
schema.title: Grain

parameters.description: day / week / month — aggregates daily buckets

get.description: Return a shortage summary across all items/locations for a scenario.
Trace the pegging tree from a node — which demand consumed which supply.
Return active shortages filtered by severity, horizon, item, and location with pagination.
Return the causal explanation for a planning node.

post.description: Create a new scenario with overrides and compute the delta vs base.

get.description: Return nodes and edges for the planning graph at (item, location, scenario).
List nodes with optional filters — used for UI dropdowns (e.g. Simulate page).

post.description: Upsert a batch of items. Upsert key: external_id.
Upsert a batch of sites/DCs. Upsert key: external_id.
Upsert a batch of suppliers.
Upsert supply conditions per (supplier × item) pair.
Upsert available stock (OnHandSupply) per (item × location).
Upsert purchase orders (PurchaseOrderSupply) with ERP external_id tracking.
Upsert forecasts (ForecastDemand) per (item × location × bucket × grain).
Upsert a batch of resources. Upsert key: external_id. Also creates/updates a Resource node in the graph.
Upsert work orders (WorkOrderSupply) with ERP external_id tracking.
Upsert customer orders (CustomerOrderDemand) with ERP external_id tracking.
Upsert stock transfers (TransferSupply) between two locations. The node is wired to the PI of the **destination** (to_location).

post.summary: Run DQ pipeline on a batch
post.description: Execute L1 (structural) + L2 (referential) checks on all rows of a batch.

get.description: Returns all unresolved data quality issues. Filterable by severity, dq_level, entity_type.

parameters.name: severity

schema.description: Filter by severity: error | warning | info
schema.title: Severity

parameters.description: Filter by severity: error | warning | info

get.summary: Get DQ results for a batch
get.description: Returns all DQ issues (resolved or not) for a specific batch.

post.summary: Trigger DQ Agent on a batch
post.description: Run the DQ Agent (stat + temporal + impact SC + LLM) on an already-ingested batch. The agent enriches data_quality_issues with impact_score and LLM insights.

get.summary: Get DQ Agent report for a batch
get.description: Returns the full agent report: narrative, priority actions, and enriched issues.
Returns the history of DQ Agent runs across all batches.

post.description: Import a complete Bill of Materials for an item. Automatically computes Low-Level Codes (LLC).

get.description: Return the active BOM for an item with its components and LLC.

post.description: Compute gross and net component requirements for a given quantity (multi-level explosion, netting against available stock).
Import non-working days for a location. Upsert per (location × date). Missing entry = working day by default.

get.description: List calendar entries for a location (optional: filter by date range).

post.description: Return the date resulting from adding N working days to a start date, respecting the location calendar.

get.description: Agrège la charge des nœuds WorkOrderSupply / PlannedSupply connectés à la resource et la compare à la capacité disponible par bucket (day / week / month).

parameters.name: to_date

schema.description: Fin de l'horizon (YYYY-MM-DD). Défaut : from_date + 84 jours.
schema.title: To Date

parameters.description: Fin de l'horizon (YYYY-MM-DD). Défaut : from_date + 84 jours.

post.description: Create or update a ghost_node with its members. Also creates Ghost node + edges in the graph.

schema.title: Response Ingest Ghost V1 Ingest Ghosts Post

get.description: List all ghost_nodes with their members.

schema.title: Response List Ghosts V1 Ghosts Get

get.description: Get a ghost's detail including members and graph node.

schema.title: Response Get Ghost V1 Ghosts  Ghost Id  Get

post.description: Execute ghost engine over a time window. Returns alerts and summary.

schema.title: Response Run Ghost Endpoint V1 Ghosts  Ghost Id  Run Post

get.description: Return the latest active planning parameters per (item, location).

post.description: Consume all unprocessed events for a scenario and run propagation.

Time-phased MRP explosion for a given item/location. Creates PlannedSupply nodes for shortage buckets, wires them via 'replenishes' edges, and emits ingestion_complete events to trigger graph propagation.

quantity_per.title: Quantity Per
quantity_per.description: Component quantity per 1 unit of parent (> 0).

is_working_day.title: Is Working Day
is_working_day.description: False = non-working day (holiday, closure). Default = False.

shift_count.title: Shift Count
shift_count.description: Number of shifts on this day [0–3]. Optional.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: ERP sales order number. Upsert key.

explosion_date.title: Explosion Date
explosion_date.description: Reference date for explosion. Defaults to today.

time_grain.title: Time Grain
time_grain.description: Time grain. Values: day | week | month.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, validation only — no DB writes.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description: Calendar entries to import (upsert per location × date).

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, validation only — no DB writes.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: Unique business identifier (e.g. ERP SKU). Upsert key.

item_type.title: Item Type
item_type.description: Item type. Values: finished_good | component | raw_material | semi_finished.

uom.title: Uom
uom.description: Base unit of measure (e.g. EA, KG, BOX).

status.title: Status
status.description: Item status. Values: active | obsolete | phase_out.

location_type.title: Location Type
location_type.description: Location type. Values: plant | dc | warehouse | supplier_virtual | customer_virtual.

parent_external_id.title: Parent External Id
parent_external_id.description: External_id of the parent site (optional, for hierarchies).

resource_type.title: Resource Type
resource_type.description: Resource type. Values: machine | line | team | tool.

location_external_id.title: Location External Id
location_external_id.description: Site where the resource is located (optional).

lead_time_days.title: Lead Time Days
lead_time_days.description: Standard lead time in calendar days.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: ERP work order number. Upsert key.

add_working_days.title: Add Working Days
add_working_days.description: Number of working days to add (>= 0).
